name: traction
description: 13 agent skills for startup founders and growth marketers — channel selection via the Bullseye Framework, phase-appropriate growth strategy, cheap channel testing, critical path planning, and 9 deep-dive acquisition channels (viral, PR, SEM, SEO, content+email, engineering-as-marketing, sales, BD, existing platforms) — distilled from Gabriel Weinberg and Justin Mares's Traction.

source_book.title: Traction: A Startup Guide to Getting Customers

skills.name: bullseye-channel-selection
skills.description: Guide systematic customer acquisition channel selection using the Bullseye Framework — brainstorm all 19 channels, rank into Inner Circle / Potential / Long-shot, test 3 in parallel, focus on the winner.

skills.name: startup-traction-strategy-by-phase
skills.description: Diagnose startup phase (I: making → II: marketing → III: scaling), apply the 50% Rule, match channels to phase, and detect the Product Trap.

skills.name: traction-channel-testing
skills.description: Design cheap channel validation tests using the 4-question protocol (CAC, volume, quality, time-to-acquire), CAC/LTV spreadsheet, and A/B optimization cadence. Detects saturation via the Law of Shitty Click-Throughs.

skills.name: startup-critical-path-planning
skills.description: Set one quantified traction goal, enumerate necessary milestones, order by dependency, apply a binary on-path/off-path filter, and cascade to departments and individuals.

skills.name: viral-growth-loop-design
skills.description: Design viral growth loops using K = i × conversion%, the 7 viral loop types, cycle time optimization, and the 4 viral mistakes check.

skills.name: startup-pr-outreach
skills.description: Plan PR campaigns using the media chain (small → top), HARO, two pitch templates, emotional angle criteria, and the 6 PR pitching mistakes check. Covers conventional and unconventional PR (stunts, customer appreciation).

skills.name: sem-performance-optimization
skills.description: Optimize Google Ads / SEM using CTR/CPC/CPA formulas, Quality Score benchmarks (avg 2.0%, low 1.5%), keyword profitability filtering (CPA vs LTV margin), and tight ad group restructuring.

skills.name: seo-channel-strategy
skills.description: Select fat-head vs long-tail SEO strategy using the page-1 feasibility check, 10% capture test, and SEM pre-validation. Plan long-tail content production pipelines and avoid black-hat tactics.

skills.name: content-and-email-marketing
skills.description: Design integrated content + email lifecycle programs across the 4 stages (Acquisition → Activation → Retention → Revenue). Includes activation threshold definition, behavioral triggers, CEO email pattern, and spam trap avoidance.

skills.name: engineering-as-marketing
skills.description: Design free tools (calculators, graders, widgets) that acquire customers through engineering effort. Single-input-field pattern, value-first-then-capture flow, HubSpot Marketing Grader reference pattern.

skills.name: startup-sales-process
skills.description: Build a sales process using SPIN Selling (Situation, Problem, Implication, Need-payoff), A/B/C lead tiering (66-75% on A deals), PNAME qualification, and detection of Technology Tourist and False Change Agent traps.

skills.name: business-development-pipeline
skills.description: Build a BD pipeline using the 5 partnership types (standard, JV, licensing, distribution, supply), attribute-based partner selection, warm introductions, 1-page term sheets, and Low-touch BD 2.0 transition.

skills.name: existing-platform-leverage
skills.description: Leverage existing platforms (App Stores, browser extensions, social networks) via parasitic growth — identify platform gaps, design minimal bridge solutions, Day-1 launch strategies, and dependency risk mitigation.

foundation.description: 4 foundation skills — Bullseye Framework, Phase Strategy, Testing, Critical Path
